likely_response.local: Pergunte a um atendente de balcão.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH bahl-KOWN.

responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH bahl-KOWN.
responses.local: Pergunte a um atendente de balcão.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de pagamento?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH puh-guh-MAYNG-too?

likely_response.local: O balcão de pagamento é na caixa.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW bahl-KOWN DIH puh-guh-MAYNG-too EH NUH KEYE-shuh.
likely_response.translation_en: The payment counter is at the cash register.

responses.english: The payment counter is at the cash register.
responses.phonetic: AW bahl-KOWN DIH puh-guh-MAYNG-too EH NUH KEYE-shuh.
responses.local: O balcão de pagamento é na caixa.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar os azulejos originais da Piriquita?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh aw-ree-zhee-NEYESH DUH pee-ree-KEE-tuh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao atendente de balcão ou ao gerente.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH bahl-KOWN OHW OW zheh-RAYNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the counter attendant or the manager.

responses.english: Ask the counter attendant or the manager.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH bahl-KOWN OHW OW zheh-RAYNG-tih.
responses.local: Pergunte ao atendente de balcão ou ao gerente.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the original azulejos are
phrases.cultural_note: The venue preserves its 19th-century ceramic tiles as a historic feature, permanently displayed near the original service area.
